prestazioni: Engine: Colombo 60° V12 (Type 213, 3.3L) with a bespoke Weisco forged 11.5:1 compression piston set (P/N 601M-11.5) paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (P/N CR-77000) for high-RPM durability, retaining the original triple Weber 40 DCZ/6 carburetors but upgraded with velocity stacks from ITG (P/N VS-40) and custom 3.5mm oversized throttle bodies by Jenvey Dynamics (P/N TBW-44i).

Forced induction: Custom-built Sprintex S300-94 supercharger kit (P/N SPX-275GTS) with a billet 3.5" pulley, intercooled via a custom PWR heat exchanger (P/N PWI-275GTS) and fed by a Bosch 044 fuel pump (P/N 0 580 254 950) with dual Aeromotive A1000 regulators (P/N 13101) to support 12 psi boost, pushing the Colombo V12 to ~420 HP at 7,800 RPM on VP Racing C16 fuel (116 octane).

Drivetrain: Reinforced Tipo 553 transaxle with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (P/N QDF7J) and a custom 3.44:1 final drive ratio (replacing the stock 3.06:1) for improved acceleration, paired with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (P/N 115-1000) and a custom 10mm shorter throw shifter from GTO Engineering (P/N GT-275SHIFT). Suspension: Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (P/N TTX40-275) with 600 lb/in front and 700 lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates by SuperPro (P/N SPF5000K), and spherical bearing rear trailing arm bushings from Whiteline (P/N KCA401). Brakes: AP Racing CP8650 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 355mm two-piece rotors (P/N CP8650-355) and Ferodo DS2500 pads (P/N FDB2070), paired with Goodridge G-Stop braided lines (P/N 20001).
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber replica of the 1966 Ferrari 275 GTS/4 NART Spyder body by RS Coachworks (P/N RS-275NART), including functional side vents, a removable hardtop with a Perspex rear window, and a custom front splitter with integrated brake ducts (P/N RS-275SPLIT). Paint: Custom "Rosso Chiaro" (Ferrari Classiche-certified) with a 5-layer pearlescent clear coat by Glasurit (P/N 923-155) and hand-painted pinstriping by Paul Dalton (P/N PD-275STRIPE).

Wheels: Custom 15x7" and 15x8" Borrani wire wheels (P/N 2096/2097) with knock-off spinners (P/N 2096KO), wrapped in Pirelli P7 Corsa Classic tires (205/70VR15 front, 225/70VR15 rear, P/N 315040/315050) and powder-coated in "Giallo Fly" (P/N RAL 1021). Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather (P/N SB-275GTS) including dashboard, door cards, and headliner, with custom Nardi 380mm steering wheel (P/N 120.00.38) wrapped in perforated leather and a MOMO Prototipo shift knob (P/N 625.10).

Aero: Functional rear diffuser by APR Performance (P/N AR100016) with integrated exhaust exits for the custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Capristo (P/N CAP-275GTS), featuring quad outlets and a valved X-pipe with GESI catalytic converters (P/N GESI-200). Lighting: Full LED conversion by United Pacific (P/N UP-275LED), including Hella 500 driving lamps (P/N 1A6 007 857-001) mounted in a custom aluminum grille by Billet Specialties (P/N BS-275GRILLE).
